notes: Source doc referenced as feedback-round2.md in the execution prompt; actual file is feedback-round-2.md (hyphenated). Baseline: all prior uncommitted work (fix-session + audit reports) is being checkpoint-committed before any round2 commits, per user decision. Task 'notes' fields seeded with prior-audit hypotheses (from VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT.md, same tree) but every task is still verified fresh before being marked done.

tasks.description: Avatar/DP upload persistence + cross-account propagation
tasks.notes: Audit hypothesis: root cause = @vercel/blob v2 addRandomSuffix default false + raw-filename pathname collisions; plus Clerk-vs-DB avatar split + webhook overwrite; plus no pusher broadcast on upload. Verify then fix.

tasks.description: Display name propagation everywhere + cross-account
tasks.notes: Audit hypothesis: updateProfile writes DB only, no pusher event; dashboard greeting already prefers DB name (P2-11) but chat/other-account still stale. Need profile-updated broadcast.

tasks.description: Fix 'already a member' false positive on remove->re-add
tasks.notes: Audit hypothesis: NOT a DB residue (removeMember hard-deletes); it's client/RSC staleness (members prop never refreshed) + orphaned TaskAssignment rows. Root-cause per acceptance criteria.

tasks.description: Real-time propagation on re-add (added user sees project live)
tasks.notes: Audit hypothesis: inviteMember DOES triggerDataRefresh but graph layout lacks the listener; addFriendToProject bypasses the helper entirely.

tasks.description: Per-member role assignment (Member->Head/Co-Head) in edit modal
tasks.notes: GATE: promotion to HEAD needs ownership-transfer semantics + last-head guard (see VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 1.1/1.2) — do NOT just widen the enum. updateMemberRole exists for CO_HEAD/MEMBER.

tasks.description: New members default to Member until promoted
tasks.notes: Audit hypothesis: likely already true (inviteMember default). Verify.

tasks.description: Bulk multi-select delete (Projects page + Dashboard)
tasks.notes: GATE: re-check HEAD per project ID server-side; keep confirm + trash window; fix Blob orphaning ideally.

tasks.description: Remove project description field entirely (card + model/form)
tasks.notes: Sweep all reads before dropping column; migration-history is db-push only.

tasks.description: Role indicator on project card (Head/Co-Head/Member)
tasks.notes: Depends on T05/T06. Role data available via memberships.

tasks.description: Minimalist view-only popup (title/description/status-priority/attachments/comments/history only)
tasks.notes: Decide UI-only vs access-scoped payload (VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 1.5).

tasks.description: Immediate selection feedback when Head assigns a member
tasks.notes: task-detail-panel assignment toggle — add instant optimistic selected state.

tasks.description: Auto-expanding comment input
tasks.notes: task-comments.tsx textarea — auto-grow to content.

tasks.description: Add due time alongside date, default 11:59 PM
tasks.notes: dueDate is already DateTime; UI is date-only. Timezone risk (VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 6.9) — decide handling.

tasks.description: Fix arrow direction (always parent->child)
tasks.notes: Root cause = stacked source+target handles at identical positions on TaskNode (VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 5.1), NOT click order. Fix handle topology; do not bulk-flip existing edges.

tasks.description: Fix blocked/dependent node accuracy
tasks.notes: Root cause = BLOCKED is a manual status decoupled from edges; approval flow bypasses the gate; soft-deleted nodes still block (VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 5.2). Derive it.

tasks.description: Add auto-arrange button (layered layout)
tasks.notes: MUST touch only updateNodePosition (never edges); batch writes; group undo; validate finite positions (VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 5.5).

tasks.description: Unread indicators on Messages/Channels tabs
tasks.notes: DM unread dots exist (P1-B); Channels-tab unread indicator likely missing. Verify both.

tasks.description: Default Messages tab = Friends (DMs), not Channels
tasks.notes: messages-client.tsx activeTab defaults to 'channels' (line ~79) — flip to dms/friends.

tasks.description: Notification click deep-links into the conversation
tasks.notes: No relatedConversationId on Notification; NEW_MESSAGE lands on /dashboard (VULNERABILITY-ASSESSMENT 3.4). Needs schema field.

tasks.description: Rename assistant away from generic 'AI chat' branding
tasks.notes: Currently named 'Loom'/'built-in planning assistant' but UI headers still say 'AI Assistant' (ai-chat-panel.tsx:179, ai-assistant-panel.tsx:105). Rename to task-helper framing.

tasks.description: Evolve Dashboard Insights (finish-today + overview + deeper planning view)
tasks.notes: Judgment call popup vs chat — justify in log. Heuristic engine only (no LLM).

tasks.description: Global readability/organization sweep across touched screens
tasks.notes: Only after T01-T21 done.
